calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for entry of default court judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:21:31 a.m. and concluding at 10:37:39 a.m.

Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic appearing represented by Howard Olsen Esq.
Defendant Charles King not appearing.

KIMBERLY VILLEGAS - is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's counsel presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

KIMBERLY VILLEGASis examined by the Court.

Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:

Exhibit 1: Rental Agreement
Exhibit 2: Warning Letter, dated 12/05/2022
Exhibit 3: Informal Conference letter, dated 12/08/2022
Exhibit 4: Letter Suspending visitor privileges, dated 12/12/2022
Exhibit 5: Housing Retention Contract, dated 12/22/2022
Exhibit 6: Automatically '86'd letter, dated 12/27/2022
Exhibit 7: Written Violation Notices
Exhibit 8: Observation Reports
Exhibit 9: Observation Reports
Exhibit 10: Observation Reports
Exhibit 11: Observation Reports
Exhibit 12: Observation Reports
Exhibit 13: Observation Reports
Exhibit 14: Observation Reports
Exhibit 15: Three Day Notice to Quit
Exhibit 16: Notices pursuant to Violence Against Women Act
Exhibit 17: Proof of service of notices

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, and against Defendant Charles King, as follows:

Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is entitled to possession of the property located at 1139 Market Street #138, San Francisco, CA 94103, County of San Francisco.

The Rental Agreement is CANCLED and the Lease is FORFEITED.

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits. (D505)
